Methodology
Priority Score = (Normalised Heat + Canopy Deficit) / 2

Data Sources
· LST: Landsat 8 C2 via Google Earth Engine
· Canopy: BCC NALL 2003 Protected Vegetation
· Boundaries: ABS SAL 2021 GDA2020

Limitation
Canopy coverage reflects protected vegetation only — total urban canopy is likely higher.
